content.problemStatement:
You are preparing a dataset for a machine learning model.  
The dataset contains the following features:


Name | Age | Color | Country  
--- | --- | --- | ---  
Alice | 25 | Red | India  
Bob | 30 | Blue | USA  
Carol | 22 | Green | Japan 

The model throws an error saying: "Input contains non-numeric values."
To fix this, you must convert the categorical features (Color, Country) into numbers.

**Question**  
Which of the following is the **MOST** appropriate way to convert the features Color and Country into numeric form so that the model can process the data?
